event.title: Treasure Trail
event.subtitle: A pocket-sized trail of playful clues, with Bubbles trotting beside you.
introPoem: Keep this little phone tucked near,
for every clue will guide you here.
Each hidden code will light your way,
as Bubbles cheers your grand hooray.
event.celebrationTitle: The final verse has led you here
celebrationPoem: You followed each rhyme from clue to clue,
and now the sparkly trail is through.
Your final surprise belongs right here,
with happy hearts and unicorn cheer.

steps.title: The Tiny Sage's Secret
steps.locationHint: A tiny sage with pointed palm and watchful eyes
poem: Seek the tiny sage so wise,
with pointed palm and watchful eyes.
Behind that pose, where secrets stay,
your next small verse is tucked away.
steps.note: Look behind the Baby Yoda statue with one hand stretched out like the Force.

steps.title: Disco Reflection
steps.locationHint: Where your face looks back with disco sparkle
poem: Find where your face looks back at you,
with disco sparkle shining through.
Behind that shine, just out of view,
another singing clue waits for you.
steps.note: Check behind the mirror that has been decorated with mirror balls.

steps.title: Under Gentle Cover
steps.locationHint: Garden rows where summer sweetness grows
poem: Step outside to garden rows,
where summer sweetness softly grows.
By the net stretched up around,
your clue is waiting to be found.
steps.note: Check the strawberry patch outside, around the makeshift netting setup.

steps.title: The Staring Pair
steps.locationHint: The biggest round eyes in the house
poem: Big round eyes that never blink,
watching snacks and every drink.
Find the biggest staring pair,
your next small clue is hiding there.
steps.note: Check the biggest googly eyes in the house, on the fridge.

steps.title: Reborn Sparkle
steps.locationHint: Old trash reborn in gems and bright display
poem: Find old trash reborn today,
now dressed in gems and bright display.
A crafty glow with vibrant hair,
your next small clue is hidden there.
steps.note: Look near your 'trash pony' craft project: the one bedazzled with gems, purple hair, and a horn.

steps.title: The Little Hidden Door
steps.locationHint: Where tiny doors in stumps appear
poem: Where tiny doors in stumps appear,
and fairy whispers hover near,
behind that little story space,
your waiting clue is tucked in place.
steps.note: Check behind the tree stump fairy house.

steps.title: Bean's Golden Finale
poem: For many days at Bean's own place,
we shared his couch and goofy face.
One runny day became household fame,
now find him in gold to end this game.
steps.note: Look near the gold statue of Pinto Bean.
